text: Anthropic just launched Claude for Small Business.
You used five apps — QuickBooks, PayPal, HubSpot, Canva, DocuSign — every single month.
Now it's one chat. Claude drafts invoices, chases payments, writes emails — and asks before sending.
Fifteen workflows. Fifteen skills. Live since May 13, 2026.
Would you trust it? Follow for more AI tools.
